productDisplayName: Lotto Women's Hawaian Palms Purple Yellow Flip Flop
description: Get ready for that long overdue trip to the beautiful woodlands. lotto brings to you Hawaiian Palms, the perfect floater for your trip. Soft and cushy, the slippers help relax your tired feet and bring back the spring in your gait in style.Upper Fabric thong straps for lightweight durability and better Fit Fabric toe separator for comfort Midsole Soft, cushy footbed for soft feel and maximum comfort Printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole in multi-directional pattern for good grip on all surfaces shoe careDo not machine washRub surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
